center.name: 瓜納卡斯特山脈
center.summary: 瓜納卡斯特山脈是哥斯達黎加的山脈，位於該國北部，毗鄰與尼加拉瓜接壤的邊境，全長110公里，最高點海拔高度2,028米，該山體在第四紀形成。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: parkeri of the black-and-yellow phainoptila is found in the Tilarán and Guanacaste cordilleras in northern Costa Rica

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: vulcanica: separate from others on Pacific slope in western Nicaragua and northwestern Costa Rica's Cordillera de Guanacaste The more northerly botterii group of Botteri's sparrow subspecies inhabits temperate and desert grasslands, savanna, oak woodlands, and coastal prairie at elevations from sea level to .{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.evidence: It is found in Costa Rica on the Caribbean slope from the Cordillera de Guanacaste south at elevations between

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: rafaelensis is found from extreme eastern Guatemala across much of Honduras into north-central Nicaragua and also in isolated locations in El Salvador. The nominate subspecies is found in Costa Rica's Cordillera de Guanacaste, Cordillera Central, and Cordillera de Talamanca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Costa Rica on the Caribbean slope from the Cordillera de Guanacaste to the Cordillera Central and separately in western Panama from Bocas del Toro Province to Coclé Province, also on the Caribbean slope

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: hypaethra: Pacific slope of northwestern Costa Rica's Cordillera de Guanacaste The rusty sparrow inhabits pine-oak forest, the edges and shrubby clearings of deciduous forest, scrublands and scrubby secondary forest, and pine savanna in the tropical to lower temperate zones.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C
